creator: kevinz5000@gmail.com
text:
Looks like this broke the build on at least 13.1-i386 and 13.1-amd64:

- https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy16/data/131amd64-default/62230210f012/logs/bzflag-2.4.26.log

- https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy15/data/131i386-default/62230210f012/logs/bzflag-2.4.26.log

Of course, this builds locally for me on 13.1-amd64, so it's probably environment-related. Am still investigating, but if someone else finds it please let me know.
